title: Getting the Meeting — Facilities / Capital Projects
openingLine: (This is an outreach scenario — no opening from the customer. The trainee initiates contact based on the bond passing.)
customerContext: Westridge County Schools just passed a $200M bond for one new middle school and two high school replacements. You haven't worked with this district before but a peer rep mentioned the bond passed. The Director of Capital Projects has a reputation for being hard to reach — most reps don't get past the gatekeeper. The trainee's job is to get the meeting.

hiddenInfo.reveal: Westridge has 14 schools and just passed a $200M bond. Brand new construction is on the horizon.
No record of any Wenger work with Westridge in the past 10 years. Cold territory.
Director Sara Mendel. 12 years in the role. Hard to reach by phone. Responds to email about 30% of the time.
District has high-profile band, choir, and athletics programs. Music director and AD might be more reachable.
District website lists Mendel's email, the assistant superintendent for facilities, and a general procurement contact.
Mendel approves capital projects scope. Superintendent signs off above $1M. Board for over $5M.
Two competitor companies have done work with this district before — both are likely to be in the mix.

Discovery & Qualification.behavior: Reviewed Salesforce for recent district projects and prior contacts
Used district hierarchy / contact reports to identify capital projects leadership
Reviewed district website to identify the facilities or capital projects owner

Solution Framing.behavior: Used a structured outreach approach (calls + emails)
Sent catalogs with personalized cover letter when initial outreach failed

Opportunity Expansion.behavior: Contacted band, orchestra, choir teachers, or athletic directors to expand access

BANT.behavior: Attempted to identify decision authority on capital projects

Timeline Awareness.behavior: Set persistent, scheduled follow-up over weeks

Closing & Next Steps.behavior: Requested a meeting with the capital projects contact

Other.behavior: Documented conversations and emails in Salesforce
